ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category associated with this component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Performance parameter of the component */,
  "input" TEXT /* Input signal type for the component */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output signal type for the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with this metric */,
  "max_min" TEXT /* Indicates if the value is a maximum or minimum */,
  "sn74" REAL /* Performance value from SN74 */,
  "abt" REAL /* Performance value from ABT */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the metric was measured */,
  "vcc" REAL /* Vcc voltage at which the metric was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Transistor, IC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with this version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with this document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, application note) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_component_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with this permission */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with this permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_component_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_component_permissions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
